title.en: But now, a mysterious force has entered the tru...

content.en:
In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom of the Top Power Ten Thousand Gods Sect is being attacked.

In the past, the Ten Thousand Gods Sect was also a little more powerful than the Void Heaven One Pulse, but now the Ten Thousand Gods Sect is far inferior to the Void Heaven One Bloodline.

It can be said that Ye Tian has helped the Void Heaven Pulse too much, and he has led the Void Heaven True Kingdom to rise completely all the way.

Today, the Pantheon Sect has five top True Ancestors, a large number of elite True Ancestors, and hundreds of thousands of ordinary True Ancestors, and its strength is not weak at all.

But now, a mysterious force has entered the true kingdom of all gods.

In an instant, the army of the True Kingdom of All Gods collapsed.

A True Ancestor fell, and a large number of True Monarchs were slaughtered, but this force did not slaughter those ordinary creatures.

No matter how the forces fight, it will not affect ordinary beings, because ordinary beings are the foundation of the major forces, and if there are no ordinary beings, there is no way to obtain a large number of geniuses by destroying the other party.

In a short time, this force entered the Pantheon of the True Kingdom of the Gods and surrounded it.

"What kind of forces are attacking our Gods True Kingdom?"

The Silver Lack True Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Gods Sect trembled.

The other party is too strong, it is far beyond their Ten Thousand Gods Sect, this time the other party dispatched a Supreme True Ancestor, dozens of top True Ancestors, and even the number of elite True Ancestors is ten times that of them, but the number of ordinary True Ancestors is very small, far inferior to the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom.

However, the victory of the battle mainly depends on the top combat power, if the top combat power is insufficient, then you must rely on a large number of True Ancestors to besiege and kill the opponent.

However, the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom could not rely on the number to besiege and kill the other party, but was easily killed by the other party A large number of True Ancestors.

Now, there are only tens of thousands of true ancestors in the true kingdom of all gods, and all of them are gathered in the Pantheon, and there is no way to escape.

"Help!"

Yinqi True Ancestor hurriedly asked for help from forces that were close to each other and had a good relationship.

Although it was blocked, it was difficult to transmit the information, but the Pantheon Sect still used some special treasures to ask for help, but the transmission was transmitted, but the result was beyond his expectations.

"Several other forces have also been attacked!"

The Silver Lack True Ancestor was really desperate.

Other forces have also been attacked, illustrating a problem.

The forces of the Vast Sea Realm had attacked the forces of their Dao Mountain Realm, and he recalled that not long ago, there were Upper Triple Heaven forces recruiting them to the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom.

However, the Dao Ancestors refused the solicitation of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces and seemed to be still waiting.

But I never expected that the forces of the Upper Triple Heaven would start a full-scale war.

"We can't escape, kill! Even if we die, we have to kill a few True Ancestors!" said Yin Que True Ancestor angrily.

However, some True Ancestors were afraid to beg for mercy, but the enemies outside did not react at all.

In fact, the forces outside did not dare to accept the surrender of the True Ancestor casually, what if it was a fraudulent surrender?

Although their combat power is stronger than that of the True Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, no one knows how many hole cards a force has, so they dare not gamble, so they can only kill them all.

Bang!!!!!

The last battle began, and almost all the True Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom were killed, but this force also suffered a lot of losses, and many True Ancestors fell.

The true ancestors of the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom were almost killed in battle, and even if there were hidden true ancestors, the number was definitely not much, but I saw that this force left a group of true ancestors, and the other true ancestors left one by one.

The True Ancestors who stayed behind could sweep through the interior of the Ten Thousand Gods True Kingdom and hunt down the disciples of the Ten Thousand Gods Sect.

It is conceivable that it will not be long before the foundation of the Myriad Divine Sect in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will be completely destroyed.

At this time.

In the chaos, the Dao Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Gods Sect were extremely angry, and it was not only the Ten Thousand Gods Sect whose true kingdom was destroyed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but also the true kingdom of many forces was also destroyed.

The point is, soon a piece of news came out, and many forces took refuge in the Upper Triple Heaven forces and joined the siege.

As a result, many forces in the chaos have gone to war with each other, and one Dao Ancestor has fallen.

It can be said that the entire Daoshan realm began to be chaotic.

This war lasted for a long, long time, and many forces were destroyed, but there were also some true ancestors of the Middle Triple Heaven forces who were almost wiped out, and the losses were extremely heavy, and the losses of the Upper Triple Heaven forces were better, because at least those indigenous forces and the Middle Triple Heaven forces who had taken refuge were in front, so their losses were not large.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

The Void Heaven True Kingdom has not been attacked, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor has also issued an order not to support other True Kingdoms.

After all, at this time, once the wrong decision is made, it will be the end of the destruction of the true country.

Ye Tian is indeed very strong, but he can't stand against one force alone!

......

this day.

A large number of True Ancestors have gathered in the Void Heaven Innocence Abroad country, and finally there are forces that are eyeing the Void Heaven Truth Country.

This time it was the six forces that attacked, this is already the limit, after all, the forces of the Upper Triple Heaven are at war against many forces in the Void Heaven True Country, even if there are forces that take refuge and the help of the forces of the Middle Triple Heaven, but those forces are also afraid of loss, and gradually began to be less attentive, so the war fell into a stalemate.

And the Upper Triple Heaven forces were also unwilling to lose, making it difficult to divide many forces to deal with the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

The Heavenly Sword Sect and the Zixia Sect sent three Invincible True Ancestors, plus four Sixfold Heaven Forces, a total of dozens of Supreme True Ancestors.

In addition, the number of True Ancestors gathered by the six major forces reached millions, which was enough to annihilate any True Kingdom.

"Do you really want to make a move against the Void Heaven True Country?"

A Supreme True Ancestor asked.

"We must make a move, the Void Heaven Pulse has not surrendered yet, nor has it made any statement, if they surrender this time, we can give up the attack!" said the Heavenly Sword Sect's Changfeng Sword Venerable.

He had already summoned the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Realm, asking them to ask the Dao Ancestors in the Chaos, and now they were waiting for the response of the Void Heaven One Vein Dao Ancestor.

-------------

Void Heaven Temple.

Many True Ancestors waited for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's reply, and soon after, the incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor descended on the Void Heaven Temple.

"Meet Dao Ancestor!"

Many true ancestors worshipped one by one.

"This time, surrender is not allowed!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Dao Ancestor, our strength is not as good as theirs!" said the Moon Shooting True Ancestor with a frown.

"I know, but it's too early to stand in line at this time, do you think that the Upper Triple Heaven Force is the master of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm? If you stand on the wrong line, not only will the Void Heaven Realm be destroyed, but even our base camp, the Void Heaven Realm, will be destroyed!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

If he hadn't been afraid of being on the wrong side, he would have taken refuge in a certain Upper Triple Heaven force.

But at present, with his understanding, the battle of the Vast Sea Realm Shattering is very complicated, and even those Upper Triple Heaven forces are not necessarily safe, perhaps it is the safest to take refuge in those three Nine Heavens forces.

However, he was also afraid that the Void Sky would be used as cannon fodder.

Black Wind Mountain is also a good choice, but he doesn't know much about Black Wind Mountain, so it is impossible for Ye Tian to take refuge in Black Wind Mountain because he is a general of Black Wind Mountain.

Nowadays, many forces in the Daoshan realm dare not take refuge casually, which is also a problem.

What's more, the current disadvantage of the Daoshan Realm is not big, but there are not many top-notch combat powers, and they can rely on the number to support it.

In addition, many forces in the Daoshan Realm currently have a proposal, that is, the major forces will unite to form a single force.

In this way, this one combined force alone would far surpass any of the Upper Triple Heaven forces in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

When the time comes, the forces of the Upper Triple Heaven will not dare to offend the forces of the Dao Mountain Realm at will.

But once many big forces are integrated, it is difficult to manage, and development becomes a big problem.

Therefore, the situation in the Daoshan Realm is very complicated.

But for now, he is unwilling to surrender, and still wants to fight.

If the Void Heaven True Kingdom can defeat this time and fight its prestige, it will be enough to deter the Triple Heaven forces, and the Void Heaven True Kingdom will also be able to reap a lot of benefits and resources from this war.

As the founder of the Void Sky Line, he is also ambitious, and he doesn't want to be subordinate to others, and he also wants to be the one who plays chess, and he doesn't want to be that chess piece.

Unless the situation is really serious, he is not willing to give up.

The order of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, many True Ancestors did not dare to disobey it, and they responded one after another.

Swish!

The incarnation of the Void Heaven True Ancestor came to Ye Tian's residence, and Ye Tian was naturally out of the customs, how could he not go out of the customs for such a big thing.

"Master!"

Ye Tian saw the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Disciple, do you know the current situation?" asked the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Got it!" Ye Tian immediately persuaded and said: "Master, the Void Heaven is still weak, why doesn't Shizun take refuge in Black Wind Mountain, Black Wind Mountain's strength is very strong, stronger than what Master knows, and taking refuge in Black Wind Mountain is also an opportunity." At the very least, those Upper Triple Heaven forces would never dare to attack the idea of Black Wind Mountain!"

"I've also thought about it, but I can't be a teacher! You should also understand the truth that you would rather be a chicken head than a phoenix tail. If you take refuge in Black Wind Mountain, you will have to listen to Black Wind Mountain's orders in the future. Even the geniuses of the Void Heaven True Realm will join the Black Wind Mountain one after another, and it will be too difficult for the Void Heaven Pulse to grow in the future! Moreover, it is difficult for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to be promoted to the Ancient Realm for a long time, and the real battle is still in the Xuanxu Realm. If the Dao Ancestors of the Vast Sea Realm cannot appear, as long as the Void Heaven First Pulse is given enough time, and more invincible True Ancestors will be born at that time, the Void Heaven One Pulse will not be afraid of any Upper Triple Heaven forces. With sufficient resources and inheritance, the teacher can also ascend to the Fifth Heaven, Sixth Heaven, or even the Seventh Heaven Dao Ancestor, and it is not hopeless to step into the Supreme Dao Ancestor in the future! But if he joins the Black Wind Mountain, will he be able to have enough resources and opportunities as a teacher? After all, not everyone in the Black Wind Mountain is the strongest Dao Ancestor!" The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor began.

Ye Tian sighed secretly, knowing that he couldn't persuade the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

He is not a Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and he can't consider the problem from the position of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Master, this time, the disciple will go all out and do his best to ensure the safety of the Void Heaven True Kingdom!" Ye Tian said.

"Okay, well, with your guarantee, I will be much more relieved to be a teacher!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile.
